query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.company_id, ec.name as company_name, ec.company_code
FROM products p
JOIN erp_companies ec ON p.company_id = ec.id
WHERE p.id IN (60002,60003,60004,60005,60007,60008,60009,60010,60013,60014,60015)
ORDER BY p.id;
